sentences.target: Je commence ma lecture après le dîner.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔ.mɑ̃s ma lɛk.tyʁ a.pʁɛ lə di.ne/

translations.fr: Je commence ma lecture après le dîner.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔ.mɑ̃s ma lɛk.tyʁ a.pʁɛ lə di.ne/
translations.en: I’m starting my reading after dinner.
translations.es: Empiezo a leer después de cenar.
translations.de: Ich beginne nach dem Abendessen zu lesen.
translations.yue: 我食完晚飯之後開始睇書。
translations.pt: Começo a ler depois do jantar.
translations.he: אני מתחיל לקרוא אחרי ארוחת ערב.
translations.vi: Tôi bắt đầu đọc sau bữa tối.
translations.nl: Ik begin na het avondeten te lezen.
translations.hi: मैं रात के खाने के बाद पढ़ना शुरू करता हूँ.
translations.el: Ξεκινάω να διαβάζω μετά το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Jeg begynner å lese etter middag.
translations.id: Saya mulai membaca setelah makan malam.
translations.da: Jeg begynder at læse efter aftensmaden.
translations.ja: 夕食後に読書を始めます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; heads the predicate.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'lecture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'commence'.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase ('après le dîner').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'dîner'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'après'.

sentences.target: Tu as de la lecture pour le métro.
sentences.reading: /ty a də la lɛk.tyʁ puʁ lə me.tʁo/

translations.fr: Tu as de la lecture pour le métro.
translations.ipa: /ty a də la lɛk.tyʁ puʁ lə me.tʁo/
translations.en: Do you have something to read for the subway?
translations.es: ¿Tienes algo para leer en el metro?
translations.de: Hast du etwas zum Lesen für die U-Bahnfahrt?
translations.it: Hai qualcosa da leggere per la metropolitana?
translations.zh-Hans: 你有在地铁上看的东西吗？
translations.yue: 你有冇啲喺地鐵上睇嘅嘢？
translations.ru: У тебя есть что почитать в метро?
translations.pt: Você tem algo para ler no metrô?
translations.he: יש לך משהו לקרוא ברכבת התחתית?
translations.tr: Metroda okuyacak bir şeyin var mı?
translations.vi: Bạn có gì để đọc trên tàu điện ngầm không?
translations.ar: هل لديك شيء لتقرأه في المترو؟
translations.nl: Heb je iets om in de metro te lezen?
translations.uk: У тебе є що почитати в метро?
translations.hi: क्या तुम्हारे पास मेट्रो में पढ़ने के लिए कुछ है?
translations.pl: Masz coś do czytania w metrze?
translations.el: Έχεις κάτι να διαβάσεις στο μετρό;
translations.nb: Har du noe å lese på T-banen?
translations.id: Kamu punya sesuatu untuk dibaca di kereta bawah tanah?
translations.sv: Har du något att läsa på tunnelbanan?
translations.ro: Ai ceva de citit în metrou?
translations.cs: Máš něco na čtení do metra?
translations.da: Har du noget at læse i metroen?
translations.ja: 地下鉄で読むものはありますか？

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'as'.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; heads the predicate.
Preposition forming a partitive construction with 'la' ('de la'); marks an indefinite quantity.
Definite article used in the partitive 'de la'; feminine singular; determiner of 'lecture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of NP 'de la lecture' serving as direct object of 'as'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/location complement ('pour le métro').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'métro'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Nous partageons notre lecture ce soir.

translations.fr: Nous partageons notre lecture ce soir.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos ler juntos.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi đọc cùng nhau.
translations.hi: आज रात हम साथ में पढ़ेंगे.
translations.ja: 今夜は一緒に読みます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'partageons'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; heads the predicate.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; singular form here; modifies 'lecture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'partageons'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' in the time expression.
Common noun, masculine singular; with 'ce' forms a temporal adjunct ('ce soir').

sentences.target: Ils interrompent ma lecture sans prévenir.

translations.fr: Ils interrompent ma lecture sans prévenir.
translations.en: They interrupt my reading without warning.
translations.de: Sie unterbrechen meine Lektüre ohne Vorwarnung.
translations.it: Interrompono la mia lettura senza preavviso.
translations.ko: 그들은 아무 예고도 없이 제 독서를 방해해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们毫无预警就打断我的阅读。
translations.yue: 佢哋冇預警就打斷我睇書。
translations.ru: Они прерывают мое чтение без предупреждения.
translations.pt: Eles interrompem minha leitura sem avisar.
translations.he: הם מפסיקים לי את הקריאה בלי התראה.
translations.vi: Họ cắt ngang việc đọc của tôi mà không báo trước.
translations.ar: إنهم يقطعون قراءتي دون سابق إنذار.
translations.nl: Ze storen me tijdens het lezen zonder waarschuwing.
translations.uk: Вони переривають моє читання без попередження.
translations.hu: Előzetes figyelmeztetés nélkül félbeszakítják az olvasásomat.
translations.hi: वे बिना चेतावनी के मेरे पढ़ने में बाधा डालते हैं.
translations.el: Διακόπτουν το διάβασμά μου χωρίς προειδοποίηση.
translations.nb: De avbryter lesingen min uten forvarsel.
translations.id: Mereka mengganggu bacaan saya tanpa peringatan.
translations.sv: De avbryter min läsning utan förvarning.
translations.ro: Ei îmi întrerup lectura fără avertisment.
translations.da: De afbryder min læsning uden varsel.
translations.ja: 彼らは前ぶれもなく私の読書を邪魔します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); subject of 'interrompent'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; heads the predicate.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'lecture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'interrompent'.
Preposition introducing a non-finite complement ('sans prévenir').
Infinitive verb; complement of 'sans', expressing manner ('without warning').
